testModifications.reasoning: Integration test had missing EmbeddingService provider causing NestJS DI failure - added proper DI configuration. Controller checkProjectMembership had incomplete role checking - added project-role validation.

criteria.criterion: AC1: HybridRetrieverService.search() accepts HybridSearchQuery and returns HybridSearchResult
AC2: HybridSearchResult.scores contains ScoreBreakdown per result with vectorScore, lexicalScore, entityScore, recencyScore, finalScore
AC3: POST /projects/:slug/kb/search returns existing KB response fields plus Phase 0 provenance
AC4: 403 when caller lacks project role of admin/developer/agent/viewer
criteria.note: Integration test verifies 403 for outsider. E2E tests require project membership setup not present in current schema.

criteria.criterion: AC5: Unknown intent uses answer weights
AC6: timeWindow filters results by indexed timestamp
AC8: Pre-rerank candidate pool is max(100, limit * 5) split evenly between vector and lexical sources
AC10: Never returns result whose sourceProjectId differs from requested projectId
AC11: HybridRetrieverService wired into RagController as primary search path

criteria.note: Service runs in-memory mode by default. graphifyEnabled check is in project update service.

criteria.criterion: AC13: ticketIds and repoRefs accepted without filtering in Phase 2

fixes: Added EmbeddingService and PrismaService as test module providers in hybrid-retriever.integration.spec.ts to resolve NestJS DI dependency
Updated checkProjectMembership in rag.controller.ts to check for specific project roles (ADMIN, DEVELOPER, AGENT, VIEWER) in agentRoleEntry records
